title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Shree Cement - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Shree Cement - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Shree Cement are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Shree Cement:
Shree Cement is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shree Cement!
